revision.comment: Created page with "{{Company |Guid=d60d9567-c0cb-4ab8-9d77-b63e40eb174c |Name=CTW Inc. |Aliases=CTW |FoundedDate=2013-08-14 |Address=Ark Hills Sengokuyama Mori Tower 29F, 1-9-10 Roppongi |City=Minato-City |Country=Japan |State=Tokyo |Website=https://ctw.inc/?lang=en }} CTW Inc. is a Japanese video game and tech company headquartered in Tokyo, specializing in browser-based games. Through its flagship platform, G123, it delivers free-to-play RPGs and strategy games adapted from popular Japan..."
revision.text: {{Company |Guid=d60d9567-c0cb-4ab8-9d77-b63e40eb174c |Name=CTW Inc. |Aliases=CTW |FoundedDate=2013-08-14 |Address=Ark Hills Sengokuyama Mori Tower 29F, 1-9-10 Roppongi |City=Minato-City |Country=Japan |State=Tokyo |Website=https://ctw.inc/?lang=en }} CTW Inc. is a Japanese video game and tech company headquartered in Tokyo, specializing in browser-based games. Through its flagship platform, G123, it delivers free-to-play RPGs and strategy games adapted from popular Japanese anime and manga franchises without requiring installations.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Company | Name=Donut Interactive Kft. | Guid=3010-26502 | Deck=Donut Interactive is an independent game development studio based in Hungary, focused on creating immersive online experiences such as the MMORPG NextWorld2. | Characters= | Concepts= | Developed_games= | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Published_games= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/242/2427269/3816630-donutinc_logo2%281%29.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3816630-donutinc_logo2(1).png","path":"242\/2427269\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Donut Interactive is an independent game development studio based in Hungary, focused on creating immersive online experiences such as the MMORPG NextWorld2.
